name: Ziti with Fresh Tomato-Olive Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Canned pitted black olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, in a large serving bowl, combine the oil, vinegar, garlic, basil, olives, capers and red pepper flakes.
3. Place a strainer over the serving bowl; squeeze the juice from the tomato halves into strainer. Push on seeds with back of a wooden spoon to extract tomato liquid. Discard the seeds.
4. Coarsely chop tomatoes and add to olive mixture; toss well.
5. Drain pasta and add to the bowl; toss well.
6. Sprinkle with cheese if desired. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
